overview.title: Audit Overview
overview.description: Review audit volume, recent high-signal events, and the current investigation surface before opening the log list.
overview.timelineSubtitle: High-signal operations sampled for the current dashboard slice.
overview.surfaceSubtitle: Prioritize the domains that most often lead to log drill-down work.
overview.guidanceSubtitle: Use the dashboard to decide whether to stay at overview level or move into detailed logs.

today.title: Events Today
today.subtitle: 24h total
today.meta: Includes successful and failed write-side operations.

failed.title: Failed Events
failed.subtitle: 24h anomalies
failed.meta: Use this to decide whether detailed triage should start from failures.

actors.title: Active Actors
actors.subtitle: Distinct operators
actors.meta: Unique users or service identities observed in the current slice.

latency.title: Write Latency
latency.subtitle: Median pipeline latency
latency.meta: Placeholder metric until charted latency distribution is wired in.

roleExport.title: Role permission export completed
roleExport.description: RBAC export finished successfully and is available for downstream review.

schedulerStop.title: Scheduler job stop request rejected
schedulerStop.description: A protected scheduler stop action failed and should be reviewed in detailed logs.

permissionReplace.title: Permission binding replaced
permissionReplace.description: A full permission replacement succeeded and may require follow-up review.

rbac.title: RBAC changes
rbac.description: Role, permission, and user binding operations continue to dominate audit investigation volume.

sessions.title: Session and login actions
sessions.description: Authentication-side activity is stable and mostly low risk in the current sample.

plugins.title: Plugin operations
plugins.description: Watch plugin lifecycle and scheduler actions for cross-boundary operational impact.

scope.title: Start from the narrowest scope
scope.description: Use the overview to choose actor, resource family, or failure state before opening the log table.

trace.title: Pivot into request detail
trace.description: When a recent event looks suspicious, continue into the log list and inspect request ID, IP, and metadata.

next.title: Escalate only after correlation
next.description: Treat overview metrics as routing signals; final incident conclusions still belong to the detailed log page.

logList.hint: Inspect backend audit records by action, resource, request trace, and time window.
logList.tableHint: This page is a read-only audit view and helps narrow investigations by key fields.
logList.emptyDescription: No records match the current filters. Adjust the time window or clear filters and try again.
logList.readonlyNotice: This page is read-only and does not allow audit records to be changed from the web UI.
logList.factSourceHint: The page consumes the settled backend `/api/audit/logs` read contract and `audit.read` permission directly.

filters.resourceTypePlaceholder: Resource type, such as user / role
